title: phyllanthus albus
intro: Phyllanthus albus, also known as the White Phyllanthus or White Flea Bane, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus albus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various liver and kidney disorders. Phyllanthus albus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional herbal remedies.
